title: phelipanche bohemica
intro: Phelipanche bohemica, also known as the Bohemian broomrape, is a parasitic plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve digestive issues, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phelipanche bohemica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of gastritis, diarrhea, and dyspepsia, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, Phelipanche bohemica has been used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various gastrointestinal disorders.
